description.en: Escape '&', '<', and '>' in a string of data. You can escape other strings of data by passing a dictionary as the optional entities parameter. The keys and values must all be strings; each key will be replaced with its corresponding value. The characters '&', '<' and '>' are always escaped, even if entities is provided. Note This function should only be used to escape characters that can’t be used directly in XML. Do not use this function as a general string translation function.
